title: The Seven Piglins
description: You are a humble swordsman that has stumbled upon a village over-run by piglins whom have cut off all communication to other villages. You must use your skills to defeat the darstadly piglins and win over the villagers.
body:
You are a humble swordsman that has stumbled upon a village over-run by piglins whom have cut off all communication to other villages. You must use your skills to fend off scheming piglins with your arsenal of deadly weapons and powers you must use to win against the piglins once and for all.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Here is a clue to the actual game:     
There is a mountain at the end of the game that you have to climb to find the final boss and defeat him.

</details>

.
